title: QAMap agent QA summary (qamap.qa v1)
description: The single-line JSON object printed by `qamap qa --format agent`. Within schema version 1, fields are only ever added — existing fields are never removed or retyped. A breaking change bumps schema.version to 2.

flowCoverage.description: Compiled affected-flow artifacts over all affected-flow artifacts for this logical scenario.

base.description: Git ref the diff was computed against.

head.description: Git ref of the change under review.

project.description: Detected project type, for example web, react-native, node, python, unknown.

runner.description: Automation output adapter selected after runner-independent QA intent analysis.

manifest.description: Path of the verification manifest in use, or null when the run used repo signals and the PR diff only.

execution.description: Explicit receipt for product QA execution. The qa command performs static analysis and draft mapping only; it never claims the target application was exercised.

route.description: Canonical next-step decision. Prefer this object over the compatibility-only readiness score and level.

command.description: Exact existing repository command when nextAction is run-repository-command. QAMap has not executed it.

level.description: Stable optional-automation value. Ignore it when automationApplicable is false and use verificationStatus instead.

basis.description: Whether this change needs an automation draft or should validate existing repository evidence.

automationApplicable.description: False when configuration, docs, generated output, tests, or analyzer rules should use repository validation instead of product E2E automation.

verificationStatus.description: Repository-validation preparation state. This never means the command was executed or passed.

intents.description: Evidence-backed change intents derived before runner selection (capped).

sources.description: Structured commit and diff locations behind the intent (capped).

omittedScenarioCount.description: Number of lower-ranked scenarios omitted from the compact payload. Use the human or JSON format when non-zero.

sources.description: The strongest diff or commit locations that caused this scenario to be proposed (capped).

flowCoverage.description: Compiled affected-flow artifacts over all affected-flow artifacts for this logical scenario.

intentCount.description: Total inferred intents before compact output capping.

omittedIntentCount.description: Intents omitted from the compact payload.

firstDraftCommand.description: Deprecated v1 field retained for compatibility. New output uses the opt-in automation object instead of promoting runner setup as the default QA action.

scenarioCoverage.description: Counts that connect routed QA scenarios to generated automation without claiming execution.

automationApplicable.description: False when draft mapping counts are compatibility detail rather than a required product E2E target.

requiredGaps.description: Required scenarios missing executable draft mapping. Always 0 when automationApplicable is false because repository validation, not product E2E compilation, is the applicable route.

evidenceSummary.description: Trace-level evidence dispositions with source references deduplicated across scenarios. This is not a quality or correctness score.

manifestCorrection.description: The highest-priority repo-local correction target when a trace has a source or mapping gap. QAMap never applies it without explicit human approval.

traceCount.description: Total deterministic QA reasoning traces before compact output capping.

omittedTraceCount.description: Reasoning traces omitted from the compact payload.

traces.description: Compact causal paths from diff evidence to affected behavior, risk, routed scenario, optional artifact, and explicit non-execution.

automation.description: Optional adapter handoff after a reviewer accepts the QA scenario. It is not required to use the QA judgment.

flows.description: Affected user flows derived from the diff, most relevant first (capped).

source.description: Where the flow came from, for example verification-manifest, core-flow, domain-language, heuristic.

draft.description: Path of the fallback draft artifact for this flow. When verificationMode is present, run existing repository evidence first instead of generating it by default.

verificationMode.description: Why this flow should validate existing evidence instead of generating a new product-journey E2E draft.

runnable.description: How trustworthy the generated draft is as an executable test. Absent when not evaluated.

entry.description: Best entrypoint hint (route or screen). Absent when unknown.

changedFiles.description: Changed or import-reached files that support this flow mapping (capped).

reviewQuestion.description: The concrete question a reviewer should answer before merge.

successSignal.description: The observable result that would prove the flow still works.

focus.description: Changed action and observable assertion preserved only when a same-title scenario is fully compiled, even if the ordered step list is compacted.

action.description: A generated draft action that matches the flow trigger, title, or compiled scenario step.

assertion.description: An observable assertion matched from generated steps or the fully compiled scenario.

existingEvidence.description: Changed test files to execute instead of generating another draft. Present for test-evidence-only changes.

scenarioAutomation.description: Compact receipts connecting selected scenario ids to generated automation status.

evidence.description: Short reasons and repository facts behind the mapping (capped).

flowCount.description: Total affected flows before compact output capping.

omittedFlowCount.description: Flows omitted from the compact payload.

compaction.description: Present when QAMap reduced lower-priority detail to keep the complete line below 4KB while retaining the highest-priority flow and a compact second flow for multi-surface changes.

requiredEvidence.description: QA evidence the change still needs before merge (required priority only, capped at 8).

recommendedEvidenceCount.description: Count of recommended-priority evidence items not listed here; run without --format agent to see them.

requiredBootstrap.description: Non-runner repository context steps (capped at 3). Runner adoption is exposed separately under the opt-in automation object.

commands.description: Suggested commands to run next, most useful first (capped at 4).
